commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an env-gated Discord inbound provenance recorder command invoked after preflight/access acceptance and before the agent turn, with unit coverage for config, payload, failure, and require-mode behavior.

PR surface: Source +262, Tests +236. Total +498 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: the PR source shows a direct Discord recorder call and DEFAULT_TENANT_ID = "johnny". I did not run the branch because this is a read-only review and the missing proof must come from a real Discord setup.
commands.review_followup: Manual review is needed because deciding whether a core Discord env recorder should exist is a product/security ownership question, and the contributor still owes real behavior proof.

target.title: feat(discord): add verified inbound recorder hook
target.body:
## Summary
- add an env-gated Discord inbound provenance recorder hook
- invoke an external recorder command with JSON over stdin after preflight/access acceptance and before the agent turn
- add focused unit coverage for recorder config, payloads, best-effort behavior, and fail-closed require mode

## Tests
- pnpm exec vitest run extensions/discord/src/monitor/verified-inbound-recorder.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts
- pnpm tsgo:extensions
- pnpm exec oxlint extensions/discord/src/monitor/verified-inbound-recorder.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/verified-inbound-recorder.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/discord/src/monitor/verified-inbound-recorder.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/verified-inbound-recorder.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts
target.author: johnny7861532
